name: Tinta Planner
tagline: Social media content management platform for marketing agencies
description: A comprehensive content management system designed for digital marketing agencies. Enables multi-client management with content pillars, a visual calendar for scheduling social media posts, newsletter campaigns, AI-powered copy generation, and role-based permissions for agency staff and clients.
highlights: Multi-agency, multi-client architecture with role-based permissions
Visual content calendar with scheduled publication dates
AI-powered copy generation using OpenAI for social media posts
Newsletter campaign management with email tracking and unsubscribe handling
Image management with Cloudinary integration and carousel support
